tagline: Pools and Gardens for Fine Homes

hero.headline:
Extraordinary Pools for Distinguished
Dallas Homes
hero.subheadline: For over 40 years, Harold Leidner Landscape Architects has designed and built breathtaking pools, gardens, and outdoor living spaces for the finest properties in Dallas-Fort Worth. From concept to construction, we create outdoor environments that elevate your home and how you live in it.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Luxury Outdoor Design &<br class="hidden md:block"> Construction
services.subtitle: From custom pools and spas to complete landscape transformations, we bring architectural vision and master craftsmanship to every project across Dallas-Fort Worth.

cards.title: Custom Pools & Spas
cards.description: Breathtaking custom pools and spas designed for Dallas' most distinguished homes. Classic, modern, or transitional — every detail reflects your vision and lifestyle.

cards.title: Landscape Architecture
cards.description: Full-service landscape design for luxury properties. Custom garden and landscape plans that enhance your home's architecture and natural setting.

cards.title: Outdoor Living Spaces
cards.description: Complete outdoor kitchens, patios, pergolas, and entertainment areas that seamlessly extend your home into the landscape.

cards.title: Water Features & Lighting
cards.description: Custom fountains, waterfalls, and professional landscape lighting that showcase your outdoor spaces from day into evening.

cards.title: Exterior Design & Build
cards.description: End-to-end design and construction for complete exterior transformations including driveways, walkways, and hardscaping elements.

cards.title: Concierge Maintenance
cards.description: Ongoing landscape maintenance to preserve and protect the beauty of your professionally designed outdoor spaces year after year.

steps.title: Design Consultation
steps.description: Meet with Harold and our design team to share your vision. We'll tour your property, discuss your lifestyle, and develop a design concept tailored to your home and how you want to live outdoors.

steps.title: Custom Design & Planning
steps.description: Our landscape architects create detailed plans with 3D renderings so you can see your future outdoor space before a single stone is placed. Every element is designed with precision and purpose.

steps.title: Expert Construction & Reveal
steps.description: Our skilled craftsmen bring the design to life with meticulous attention to detail. We manage every phase of construction and walk you through your completed outdoor environment.

about.label: Why Dallas Trusts Harold Leidner
about.headline: 40+ Years Reimagining Nature for Fine Living
about.description: Harold Leidner Landscape Architects is the leading Dallas landscape architecture firm, trusted by top architects, builders, and homeowners throughout North Texas. From Highland Park and Preston Hollow to University Park and beyond, we have designed and built extraordinary outdoor environments for over four decades. Our team of 17 professionals brings architectural vision, master craftsmanship, and a proven process to every project.

features.title: Full Design-Build Firm
features.description: From initial concept through final construction, everything is handled in-house by our team of architects, designers, and craftsmen.

features.title: Trusted by Dallas' Finest
features.description: Celebrity clients, top architects, and the most distinguished homeowners in Highland Park, Preston Hollow, and University Park trust our work.

features.title: Award-Winning Excellence
features.description: A 14-time Best of Houzz winner and member of the Institute of Classical Architecture & Art. Our work speaks for itself.

pricing.headline: Tailored Design for Every Property.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom. Schedule a consultation and we will create a detailed proposal designed around your property, vision, and investment level.

guarantee.headline: Our Commitment to Excellence
guarantee.description: We stand behind every project we design and build. If any element of your landscape or pool does not meet the standards we set together during the design process, our team will return and make it right. After 40+ years, our reputation is built on delivering extraordinary results — and we intend to keep it that way.

faqs.question: How long does a typical landscape or pool project take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary based on scope. A custom pool typically takes 3-5 months from design to completion. Full landscape transformations may take 4-8 months. During your consultation, we provide a detailed timeline so you know exactly what to expect at every phase.

faqs.question: Do you work with my architect or builder?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We collaborate closely with architects, builders, and interior designers throughout the Dallas-Fort Worth area. Many of the region's top architects specifically recommend Harold Leidner for landscape architecture and pool design.

faqs.question: What areas of Dallas-Fort Worth do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Highland Park, Preston Hollow, University Park, Westover Hills, Frisco, Carrollton, and communities throughout Dallas and Fort Worth. If you have a property in the DFW metroplex, we would love to discuss your project.

faqs.question: Can you handle the entire project from design to construction?
faqs.answer: Yes. Harold Leidner is a full design-build firm. We handle everything from the initial design consultation and architectural plans through permitting, construction, planting, and final walkthrough. One team, one point of contact, one standard of excellence.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing maintenance after the project is complete?
faqs.answer: Yes, our Concierge Maintenance program provides ongoing care to preserve and protect your investment. From seasonal plantings to irrigation management, we keep your landscape looking as stunning as the day it was completed.

testimonials.name: Troy Aikman
testimonials.text: Very pleased with our experience. Harold and his team delivered exceptional results for both of our Dallas properties. Would use Harold again if the opportunity presented itself.

testimonials.name: John & Mrs. Carona
testimonials.text: Harold and his team were outstanding to work with. They easily understood our taste and what we were looking for and created a landscape that was everything we wanted and more — and made the whole process easy and pleasant for us.

testimonials.name: Ryan Marron
testimonials.text: They did an exceptional job from start to finish. They walked us through the scope of the project and kept us updated throughout with any changes and updates. The final result exceeded our expectations.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform Your
Outdoor Living Space?
contact.subtitle: Schedule a complimentary design consultation with Harold Leidner. We will visit your property, discuss your vision, and show you what is possible.

footer.description: Dallas' leading landscape architecture firm. Designing extraordinary outdoor spaces for 40+ years.
